_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Positive momentum (+25) and ETF inflows (+45) suggest mild upward drift from Anxiety toward Complacency, but divergent risk factors warrant low conviction until confirmation signals materialize.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial agreement — both see eventual upward recovery, but the analyst is cautious and data-driven while the narrative writer is more conviction-heavy on the bottom analog; the analyst's higher trust weight tempers the narrative's enthusiasm.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear & Greed rises above 40 with DXY breaking below 100.5 and funding cooling below 0.003%
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 22 with BTC losing $62K and funding turning negative
